description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request and push to the main branch. Use a matrix strategy to build for multiple targets (linux-x86_64-static, linux-x86_64-dyn, win32-static, win32-dyn) on an ubuntu-latest environment with a custom container image. For each target, extract the branch name, check out the code, install dependencies, and compile using meson and ninja.
